article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of the Mexican producer known for collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has made a significant contribution to the production community by releasing the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, which have been utilized in various of his works.
His approach to production is characterized by a focus on the rhythmic and percussive elements inherent to moombahton and dancehall, while also incorporating modern electronic textures.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his association with a range of similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
